card1.title: The Platinum Care
card1.description: Our premium garment care service featuring hand washing, steam treatment, and protective tissue wrapping for your finest clothing.

card2.title: Executive Collection
card2.description: Professional care for business attire with expert pressing, stain removal, and fabric revitalization for a polished appearance.

card3.title: Couture Preservation
card3.description: Specialized care for designer pieces and delicate fabrics. Museum-quality cleaning to preserve texture, color, and elegance.
